_comment: Pinned seccomp profile for the no-egress model sandbox (T071, security-boundary.md). Allow-by-default with an explicit block-list of privilege-escalation / host-manipulation / kernel syscalls, so untrusted model code cannot mount, load kernel modules, ptrace, change namespaces, or reconfigure the host. Combined with cap_drop ALL, no-new-privileges, a non-root user, a read-only root fs, and --network none it is defence-in-depth. A stricter default-deny allow-list profile validated on hardware can replace this later.
